mapper.insert:
/* 알람 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_alarm ( site_id, device_id, device_type, std_date, alarm_type, alarm_msg, alarm_cfm_yn, alarm_cfm_date, alarm_cfm_uid, alarm_note, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceType}, select STR_TO_DATE(#{stdDate}, "%Y%m%d%H%i%s"), #{alarmType}, #{alarmMsg}, #{alarmCfmYn}, #{alarmCfmDate}, #{alarmCfmUid}, #{alarmNote}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
